name: my-chess-opening

scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build:electron && npm run build:ui:angular
scripts.build:prod: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:core && npm run build:electron && npm run build:ui:angular:prod
scripts.preview:prod: npm run build:prod && npm -w electron run preview:prod
scripts.prisma:migrate:open: npm run prisma:migrate -- && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:studio
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:prod && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish never && npm run checksums:release
scripts.package:linux:compiled: electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish never && npm run checksums:release
scripts.package:linux:ci: npm run build:prod && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish never
scripts.package:windows: npm run build:prod && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never && npm run checksums:release
scripts.package:windows:compiled: electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never && npm run checksums:release
scripts.package:windows:ci: npm run build:prod && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never

description: Open-source desktop app to import, store, and explore chess games.
